sentence: 他对乳制品过敏，不能喝牛奶。
pinyin: Tā duì rǔ zhìpǐn guòmǐn, bù néng hē niúnǎi.
english: He is allergic to dairy products and cannot drink milk.

sentence: 探险队在丛林里迷路了好几个小时。
pinyin: Tànxiǎn duì zài cóng lín lǐ mílù le hǎo jǐ gè xiǎoshí.
english: The expedition team got lost in the jungle for several hours.

sentence: 这本书记录了他二十年的创业历程。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū jìlù le tā èrshí nián de chuàngyè lìchéng.
english: This book documents his twenty-year journey of building a business.

sentence: 公司正在制订新的员工培训计划。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài zhìdìng xīn de yuángōng péixùn jìhuà.
english: The company is formulating a new employee training plan.

sentence: 晚间新闻在八点准时播出。
pinyin: Wǎnjiān xīnwén zài bā diǎn zhǔnshí bōchū.
english: The evening news airs punctually at eight o'clock.
